text: As I move through this modern, almost sterile environment, I am confronted by the stark clarity of glass walls and the vibrant, stimulating displays on research and development. The juxtaposition of the highly functional—fire extinguishers, screens, tables—and the conceptual—words about innovation and coexistence—renders me acutely aware of the dualities in human existence. I feel a sense of anticipation and intellectual curiosity, yet I am also reminded of the isolation and abstraction that often accompany progress. This is a place where ideas and safety measures cohabit, where the quest for knowledge is both celebrated and contained. I feel both inspired and unsettled, keenly aware that the pursuit of understanding is both a unifying force and a source of distance.
